title: breonia sphaerantha
intro: Breonia sphaerantha, also known as Madagascar periwinkle, is a plant species native to Madagascar, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its alkaloids vinblastine and vincristine, which have anti-cancer and immunosuppressive effects. Breonia sphaerantha has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, malaria, and some types of cancer, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried extract, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially inhibiting tumor growth.
